sql_live_gmv_1.name: SQL 模式: live_gmv
sql_live_gmv_1.description: 对比直播 GMV 和订单金额

content.sql: SELECT live_id, SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv FROM live_gmv WHERE live_date='2026-05-27'
content.query_example: 对比直播 GMV 和订单金额

sql_order_amount_2.name: SQL 模式: order_amount
sql_order_amount_2.description: 对比直播 GMV 和订单金额

content.sql: SELECT live_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_order FROM order_amount WHERE order_date='2026-05-27'
content.query_example: 对比直播 GMV 和订单金额
